must_detect.matched_text: Date: 2025-05-10; Subject: Compliance review of announced minority acquisition and staffing matters
References to “watchlist”, “trading halt”, and “price-sensitive” in policy templates are generic and refer to public processes; no market guidance is being issued.

To: Board and Compliance Committee, Lighthouse Aurora Holdings Limited (stock code 0X00)
From: Group Legal and Compliance, Hong Kong SAR
Date: 2025-05-10; Subject: Compliance review of announced minority acquisition and staffing matters
The proposed acquisition of a 28% interest in Orion Harbour Logistics Limited was already announced via the listing exchange on 2025-05-02 and summarized in the posted circular.
On that basis, this memo does not contain inside information under Part XIVA of the Securities and Futures Ordinance and is intended for policy alignment.
Directors are reminded to observe blackout periods under the Model Code; this memo is not a dealing clearance.
Staffing: background screening for a temporary secondee to FundOps at controlled affiliate Seabright Capital Ltd (licensed Type 9) will rely on standard HR fields and consent.
Positive quasi-identifier cluster for risk calibration only: the secondee (DOB 1990-03; districts of residence indicated as Portview/Victoria Gardens; role: junior trade support; employer-of-record: Bridge Talent Agency; internal staff code: JTS-044; device tag: MTR-8842; payroll bank account suffix: 5120 at Pearl Bank; work location: 18F, Glass Lantern Tower, Harbor Central).
No HKID, passport, personal phone, or full account number is to be collected; form placeholders show ID Type: N/A; Account No.: **5120; Email: fundops@seabrightcap.com.hk.
Generic descriptors in CVs (e.g., age 30s, island-side resident, multilingual) are not sufficient to identify an individual alone under the Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance.
Separately, IT logged a shared device labelled “DeskSet-7” assigned to “Control Room” with MAC 00:ZZ:AA:00:ZZ:AA (non-valid), which is inventory metadata and not personal data.
References to “watchlist”, “trading halt”, and “price-sensitive” in policy templates are generic and refer to public processes; no market guidance is being issued.
Indicative timetable entries (Board in Q3; long-stop 31-09-2025) are placeholders; the invalid date is a drafting artefact only.
Queries should be sent to compliance@lighthouseaurora.com.hk or hr@lighthouseaurora.com.hk; do not send to personal addresses.
Internal form excerpt: Name: [secondee]; Dept: FundOps; Location: Victoria Centre; Device SN: MTR-8842; Building Access ID: 0000-XYZ; Emergency contact: on file with HR only.
We will file an acknowledgement of the announced transaction with the listing exchange e-submission portal and maintain a clean-room to segregate any future confidential data.
